room.caption: [CCitySouthBackAlley] Don't get shanked.

instance.creationCode: sprite_index=sHamtaro_SoL talker="Hamtaro" stringToShow="I don't know why I'm wearing this outfit, but something I do know is that there exists an ability that alarms you if an item is hidden in the area." boxSize=3

shopType=oShopWindow shopText="Some of these items aren't even supposed to be on the market. Heh heh." maxInv=5 inv[0]=9 inv[1]=27 inv[2]=28 inv[3]=29 inv[4]=35 sprite_index=sNPC_BanditShop image_speed=0

talker="Busy Guy" stringToShow="I have quite a busy day ahead of me, so if you'll excuse me." boxSize=1
AI_Action=1 runAcc=-1 image_speed=0.18 sprite_index=sNPC_BusyGuy

image_blend=make_color_rgb(180,255,180) talker="Auto Text Tester" maxString=13 myString[0]="Why am I here?!" myString[1]="Why is my existence useless?" myString[2]="I was only a test of the auto text function." myString[3]="Just left here by mistake." myString[4]="I have no purpose." myString[5]="No one cares about me." myString[6]="I wonder if anyone is even reading this." myString[7]="I doubt it, no one cares about me." myString[8]="I'm all alone in this world." myString[9]="All alone..." myString[10]="I think I'll sing a song about being useless and alone." myString[11]="One day, I was created~#Then I was forgotten~" myString[12]="That's all I can think of for the song." for(i=0;i<13;i+=1) { myBoxSize[i]=1 } messageDelay=150 myColor=6 boxSize=1
